commands.review_summary:
The PR routes WhatsApp Web credential reads, writes, setup detection, backup restore/rotation, and socket startup through symlink-rejecting regular-file helpers, with focused tests and a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main reads and stats WhatsApp creds.json through APIs that follow symlinks, and socket startup reaches Baileys without a symlink preflight. I did not execute a filesystem repro because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: This protected maintainer/security PR has no narrow automated repair finding; the next action is maintainer review, compatibility acceptance, and completed CI.

target.title: fix(whatsapp): reject symlinked credential files
target.body:
## Summary
- Route WhatsApp Web credential reads and writes through fs-safe regular-file helpers that reject direct credential symlinks and symlinked auth-directory parents.
- Revalidate the credential path at the atomic write boundary before normal `creds.json` saves, backup rotation, and backup restore writes.
- Preserve existing recovery behavior for truncated regular creds and valid large creds while adding the requested changelog entry.

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/whatsapp/src/session.test.ts extensions/whatsapp/src/auth-store.test.ts extensions/whatsapp/src/accounts.whatsapp-auth.test.ts extensions/whatsapp/src/channel.setup.test.ts`
- `pnpm tsgo:extensions`
- `git diff --check`
- `codex review --uncommitted`

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: WhatsApp Web credential reads and writes now reject direct symlinked `creds.json` files, symlinked backup credential paths, and symlinked auth directory parents instead of reading or writing through them.
Real environment tested: Local Linux Codex worktree with filesystem symlink fixtures in focused Vitest coverage.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/whatsapp/src/session.test.ts extensions/whatsapp/src/auth-store.test.ts extensions/whatsapp/src/accounts.whatsapp-auth.test.ts extensions/whatsapp/src/channel.setup.test.ts`
Evidence after fix: Tests cover symlinked primary creds before reads and writes, symlinked backup creds before restore and backup rotation, symlinked auth directories, symlinked auth parents before directory creation, truncated-creds backup selection, and valid large creds.
Observed result after fix: Focused tests, extension typecheck, whitespace check, and final Codex review all passed.
What was not tested: Live WhatsApp QR/device login; no real credentials were used.
